hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: Passionate developer creating modern and scalable web applications. Specialized in the MERN stack and cutting-edge technologies.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.description: A selection of projects that demonstrate my full stack development skills

webScraper.title: Advanced Web Scraper & Data Automation System
webScraper.description: Automated data collection and processing system designed to eliminate manual workflows and improve decision-making.
details: Developed a web scraping solution using Node.js and Puppeteer to collect and centralize market data from multiple sources.
Automated data processing and reporting, reducing manual effort and contributing to an 87% improvement in operational efficiency.
Built a web interface for managing and visualizing data using React and SQL Server.
Designed to support real business use cases with scalable and maintainable architecture.

ocr.title: OCR Label Recognition Prototype
ocr.description: Prototype system for automated label recognition using computer vision techniques.
details: Developed an OCR solution using Python, OpenCV, and EasyOCR to extract information from product labels.
Implemented image preprocessing techniques to improve text detection accuracy under varying conditions.
Integrated the OCR pipeline into a web-based workflow for data processing and validation.
Explored automation of manual labeling processes to reduce human error and improve efficiency.

responses.webscraper: 🕷️ Automated data collection system with Node.js, Puppeteer and SQL Server. Designed to eliminate manual workflows, contributing to an 87% improvement in operational efficiency.
responses.ocr: 🔍 OCR prototype using Python, OpenCV and EasyOCR for automated label recognition. Implements image preprocessing techniques to improve text detection accuracy.
responses.frontend: ⚛️ Experience with React, Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS to create modern, responsive and high-performance interfaces.
responses.backend: 🖥️ Working with Node.js, Express.js and scalable architectures. Focused on REST APIs, security and performance optimization.
responses.database: 🗄️ Working with MongoDB, PostgreSQL and SQL Server. Efficient schema design and query optimization for maximum performance.
responses.python: 🐍 Development with Python, Flask and AI/ML libraries like OpenCV, Tesseract and EasyOCR for computer vision projects.
